name: 2200-nen Neko no Kuni Nippon
overview: Takes place in the year 2200, where Japan has become a land of cats as the human population's birth rate has declined. In this future world, cats can talk, learn, and work. The story follows a high school girl and her argumentative cat.

trailers.title: 【2200年ねこの国ニッポン】ライトアニメ ティザー映像
